sentences.arabic: كَانَ الصَّانِعُ يَصْنَعُ الأَوَانِيَ مِنَ الْفَخَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Zanatlija je pravio posude od keramike.
sentences.translationEn: The craftsman used to make vessels from pottery.
He would shape the clay with his hands skilfully.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ يُحْرِقُ الأَوَانِيَ فِي الْفُرْنِ حَتَّى تَصْلُبَ.
sentences.translation: Potom je pekao posude u peći dok ne otvrdnu.
sentences.translationEn: Then he would fire the vessels in the kiln until they hardened.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمَ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ الأَوَانِيَ لِحِفْظِ الطَّعَامِ وَالْمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su koristili ove posude za čuvanje hrane i vode.
sentences.translationEn: People used these vessels to store food and water.
